title: SNDL (SNDL) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: The company reported record full-year net revenue of $920 million and achieved positive free cash flow of $8.9 million for 2024, exceeding guidance. Gross profit reached $240 million with a gross margin of 26.1%, representing a 520 basis point improvement year-over-year. CEO Zach George stated: 2024 has been a year of records for SNDL and emphasized that the company aims to deliver $100 million in annualized free cash flow within the next three years. Cannabis Operations: Achieved four consecutive quarters of positive gross profit with Q4 margins of 27.2%. Cannabis Retail: Posted record financial performance with 10.7% revenue growth in Q4. Liquor Segment: Faced market headwinds but improved margins to 22% in Q4 through cost optimization. The company completed the Indiva acquisition, privatized Nova, and announced a Canadian Stock Exchange listing application to provide shareholder optionality.
